'''Uvena III''' was a [[Shistavanen/Legends|Shistavanen]] colony [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Uvena system/Legends|Uvena system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. Expatriates of Uvena III included [[Mal Biron]], [[Caet Shrovl]], and [[Riv Shiel]].

{{Planet-stub}}
